name: process-vs-work-doctrine
description: Adjudication gate for adding process versus doing the work: pain before process, kill a layer to add a layer, minimal form before third real use, write-only records die, frozen means frozen, and a meta-session quota.

source.title: Ecosystem Audit 2026-07 Doctrine
source.relationship: Authored as the third output of the 2026-07-03 ecosystem audit (docs/ecosystem-audit-2026-07.md), after the meta-to-product commit ratio reached roughly 13:1 across the workspace. Packaged as a portable baseline so every machine that pulls ai-toolkit can apply the same gate to its workspace instruction files.
